name: batches_send
description: Send an SMS message or batch of messages to one or more recipients. Messages are queued and sent at the rate limit in FIFO order. Long messages are automatically split into multiple parts.

parameters.name: service_plan_id
parameters.description: Your Sinch service plan ID (path parameter).

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Array of recipient phone numbers in E.164 format or group IDs.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Sender number in E.164 format. Must be a number associated with your account.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The message body text. Supports parameterization with ${parameter_key}.

parameters.name: expire_at
parameters.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the message expires if not yet delivered.

parameters.name: callback_url
parameters.description: Override webhook URL for delivery report callbacks.

parameters.name: parameters
parameters.description: Key-value pairs for message body parameterization per recipient.
